command-reroll.name: Command Re-roll
command-reroll.description: Use this Stratagem after you have made a Hit roll, a Wound roll, a Damage roll, a saving throw, an Advance roll, a charge roll or a Desperate Escape test for a model in your army.

insane-bravery.name: Insane Bravery
insane-bravery.description: Use this Stratagem at the start of the Battle-shock step of your Command phase.
insane-bravery.effect: Select one unit from your army that is below its Starting Strength. That unit automatically passes its Battle-shock test this turn.

grenade.name: Grenade
grenade.description: Use this Stratagem in your Shooting phase.
grenade.effect: Select one GRENADES unit from your army that has not Advanced, Fallen Back, or shot this turn. Roll 6D6: for each 4+, one enemy unit within 8" and visible to your unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

fire-overwatch.name: Fire Overwatch
fire-overwatch.description: Use this Stratagem when an enemy unit is set up or when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance, or Fall Back move.
fire-overwatch.effect: One unit from your army that is within 24" of and visible to that enemy unit can shoot at it. Hits scored only on unmodified 6s.

heroic-intervention.name: Heroic Intervention
heroic-intervention.description: Use this Stratagem at the end of the Charge phase.
heroic-intervention.effect: Select one unit from your army that is not within Engagement Range of any enemy units. That unit can make a move of up to 3" — it can move within Engagement Range of enemy units.
heroic-intervention.target: Any unit not in Engagement Range

counter-offensive.name: Counter-offensive
counter-offensive.description: Use this Stratagem after an enemy unit has fought in the Fight phase.
counter-offensive.effect: Select one unit from your army that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit and has not already fought this phase. That unit fights next.
counter-offensive.target: Unit in Engagement Range of enemy that just fought

go-to-ground.name: Go to Ground
go-to-ground.description: Use this Stratagem when an enemy unit targets an INFANTRY unit from your army.
go-to-ground.effect: Until the end of the phase, all models in your unit have a 6+ invulnerable save. If they already have an invulnerable save, add 1 to it instead (max 3+).

smokescreen.name: Smokescreen
smokescreen.description: Use this Stratagem at the end of your Movement phase.
smokescreen.effect: Select one SMOKE unit from your army. Until the start of your next turn, ranged attacks against that unit's model have a -1 to Hit roll.

rapid-ingress.name: Rapid Ingress
rapid-ingress.description: Use this Stratagem at the end of your opponent's Movement phase.
rapid-ingress.effect: Select one unit from your army that is in Reserves. That unit can arrive on the battlefield as if it were the Reinforcements step of your Movement phase.

fury-of-the-hearth.name: Fury of the Hearth
fury-of-the-hearth.description: Use this Stratagem in your Shooting phase, when a LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army is selected to shoot.
fury-of-the-hearth.effect: Until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in that unit have +1 to their Strength characteristic. If you spend 1YP, those weapons also have [SUSTAINED HITS 1].

targeting-closest.name: Targeting Closest
targeting-closest.description: Use this Stratagem in your Shooting phase, when a LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army is selected to shoot.
targeting-closest.effect: Until the end of the phase, if that unit targets the closest eligible target: re-roll wound rolls of 1. If the unit is KÂHL, EINHYR HEARTHGUARD, or ÛTHAR THE DESTINED, also improve AP by 1.

grim-demeanour.name: Grim Demeanour
grim-demeanour.description: Use this Stratagem in the Fight phase, when a LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army is selected to fight.
grim-demeanour.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

oathmark-acquisitors.name: Oathmark Acquisitors
oathmark-acquisitors.description: Use this Stratagem at the start of your Command phase.
oathmark-acquisitors.effect: Select one LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army that is within range of an objective marker. You gain 1 additional YP.
oathmark-acquisitors.target: LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit on objective

hammer-of-votann.name: Hammer of Votann
hammer-of-votann.description: Use this Stratagem in your Shooting or Fight phase, when a LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit from your army is selected to shoot or fight. Costs 1CP and 1YP.
hammer-of-votann.effect: Until the end of the phase, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, a Critical Hit is scored on an unmodified Hit roll of 5+.
